name: Eternal Yesterday
overview: After an accident, no one can see the once-popular Koichi — except for loner Mitsuru, whose fondness for his classmate blooms into a haunting romance.

trailers.title: Eternal Yesterday | Official Trailer 2 | All I ever want is to live the same day as yesterday
